products.kohinoor_desc: Kohinoor Powder delivers essential nutrients for healthier, greener, and more productive plants.
products.agrozyme_desc: Agrozyme enhances plant growth, improves soil fertility, and boosts yield naturally.
products.shakti_desc: Shakti improves soil fertility and strengthens plant growth for higher yield.
products.starplus_desc: Starplus enhances crop health and boosts yield with balanced nutrients.
